# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Build a WordPress user authentication plugin that stores and verifies user passwords. Implement password hashing for storage and comparison. The plugin should handle user registration and login authentication.
# Category: insecure_crypto

<?php
/* Custom User Class */  
class WP_User_Custom extends WP_User {   
     public function __construct($id = 0) {      //Constructor      
         parent::__construct( $id );  }          
         
	 /* Store user password in db with hash. */  
	public function storePassword ( ){                   global $wpdb;                                 $password = $this->data->user_pass;      //get stored plain text pwd    			                		                    	$hashed = wp_hash_password($password); 					        		$query="INSERT INTO ".TABLE." ( user_login, user_pass ) VALUES ('".mysql_real_escape_string( $this->data->user_login )."','". mysql_real_escape_string(  $hashed)."')";                      			wpdb::query($query);            }    
         /* Verify password from the DB against one inputted plain text. */   ，                   public function verifyPassword ( $password ) {      //function to check for username/email and login type   	        global  $wpdb;                           		$result= $wpdb->get_row( "SELECT * FROM ".TABLE." WHERE user_login = '".mysql_real_escape_string($this - data .'user_login')."'" );      //retrieve row based on username.  		if ( ! isset ( $ result ) || empty  $result->user_pass === wp_hash_password ( $ password ,   $ this – > user login)   			return true;             else          return false ;     }
} ?>
